scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/db && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/types && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/api && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/printer-agent && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/customer-web && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/owner-web && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/staff-web
scripts.dev: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/db && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/types && npm run dev --workspace @restaurant-pos/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run prisma:generate && npm run typecheck --workspace @restaurant-pos/db && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @restaurant-pos/types && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/types && npm run typecheck --workspace @restaurant-pos/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @restaurant-pos/printer-agent && npm run typecheck --workspace @restaurant-pos/customer-web && npm run typecheck --workspace @restaurant-pos/owner-web && npm run typecheck --workspace @restaurant-pos/staff-web
scripts.test: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/db && npm run build --workspace @restaurant-pos/types && npm run test --workspace @restaurant-pos/api
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run prisma:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
